column1: さあ、出発しよう。全員揃っているね。
column2: さあ、しゅっぱつしよう。ぜんいんそろっているね。
column3: Right then, let's go. Everyone's here.
column4: さ / さあ (interjection: come on / right then / well...)
column5: さ / さあ + [action invitation / transition] / さあ + [expression of uncertainty]
column6: さあ: urges action ('come on, let's go'), transitions to a new activity, or expresses uncertainty ('well, I'm not sure'); さ: lighter version of same
column8: さあ = action launch or vague uncertainty; さ = lighter さあ; よし = positive self-motivating transition; えーと = hesitation/uncertainty filler
